Module 5:
Introduction
!
Executive Summary
This module is all about creating great prelaunch content for your launch.
Prelaunch content is what will make your launch rock.
Everything you learn here can be applied to both Internal and JV launches.
If you’re doing a Seed Launch this is also the same process and
psychology you’ll want to use.
I’m going to walk you through some examples and actual pieces of
prelaunch content. You’ll see why they were successful and what they can
improve upon.
Don’t do this: “Well that works for them, but not for me for XYZ reasons.”
• 	Work with what you have and build from there
• 	Every single one of these people had nothing and built it up over time
Take one little baby step and you’ll gradually build authority, positioning,
and everything else you need to succeed. Use these models but apply your
own special sauce and assets.
!
!
!

Key Takeaways
• 	Don’t make excuses or say, “yeah, but…”
• 	Take what works from the examples and run with it. Remember, if you’re
still here you’re a rockstar!
• 	Keep taking part in the community and leave a comment below the
video. I’d love to know that you’re still here
!
